PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-13-2015 Continued To Nov-17-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Espey for and with (petitioner) Jean Chui.

The Court stated that this was originally filed as an intestacy procedure, that a supplement was filed indicating that there will be an effort to prove up the will and that they need to notice the amended petition and to re-publish. Ms. Espey stated that the terms of the will are the same as the intestacy, that it is all the same beneficiaries and that the family is happy to proceed as an intestacy. The Court stated that there is a will and that this needs to proceed properly. The petition for letters of administration was continued to November 17, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
